name: L'Aeroclub
message: aeroclub.es zoominfo.com/c/laeroclub/372501174 L'Aeroclub is Europe's biggest general and sports aviation club for people who love flying. They help anyone become a pilot, offering training programs for everything from small private planes to sports aircraft. Whether you want to get your first pilot's license or explore different types of flying, they've got classes and support to help you take to the skies. With locations across Europe, they make learning to fly fun and accessible for aviation
